title: crepidium heliophilum
intro: Crepidium heliophilum, also known as the terrestrial orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crepidium heliophilum include its potential to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Crepidium heliophilum can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
